items.title: CVE-2025-13120 | mruby up to 3.4.0 src/array.c sort_cmp use after free (Issue 6649)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in mruby up to 3.4.0. It has been declared as critical. This vulnerability affects the function sort_cmp of the file src/array.c. Such manipulation leads to use after free. This vulnerability is traded as CVE-2025-13120. An attack has to be approached locally. Furthermore, there is an exploit available. It is advisable to implement a patch to correct this issue.

items.title: CVE-2025-13119 | Fabian Ros/SourceCodester Simple E-Banking System 1.0 cross-site request forgery
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in Fabian Ros/SourceCodester Simple E-Banking System 1.0. It has been classified as problematic. This affects an unknown part. This manipulation causes cross-site request forgery. This vulnerability appears as CVE-2025-13119. The attack may be initiated remotely. In addition, an exploit is available.

items.title: CVE-2025-13118 | macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 /order/paySuccess orderID improper authorization
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability was found in macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 and classified as critical. Affected by this issue is the function paySuccess of the file /order/paySuccess. The manipulation of the argument orderID results in improper authorization. This vulnerability is reported as CVE-2025-13118. The attack can be launched remotely. Moreover, an exploit is present. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

items.title: CVE-2025-13117 | macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 /order/cancelOrder orderId improper authorization (EUVD-2025-175324)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability has been found in macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 and classified as critical. Affected by this vulnerability is the function cancelOrder of the file /order/cancelOrder. The manipulation of the argument orderId leads to improper authorization. This vulnerability is documented as CVE-2025-13117. The attack can be initiated remotely. Additionally, an exploit exists. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

items.title: CVE-2025-13116 | macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 /order/cancelUserOrder orderId improper authorization
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3. Affected is the function cancelUserOrder of the file /order/cancelUserOrder. Executing manipulation of the argument orderId can lead to improper authorization. This vulnerability is registered as CVE-2025-13116. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. Furthermore, an exploit is available. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

items.title: CVE-2025-13115 | macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 Order Details /order/detail/ detail orderId improper authorization
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability, which was classified as problematic, has been found in macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3. This impacts the function detail of the file /order/detail/ of the component Order Details Handler. Performing manipulation of the argument orderId results in improper authorization. This vulnerability is cataloged as CVE-2025-13115. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. Furthermore, there is an exploit available. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

items.title: CVE-2025-13114 | macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3 /cart/update/attr updateAttr improper authorization

items.content: A vulnerability classified as critical was found in macrozheng mall-swarm up to 1.0.3. This affects the function updateAttr of the file /cart/update/attr. items.title: CVE-2025-11769 | Content Flipper Plugin up to 0.1 on WordPress Shortcode flipper_front bgcolor cross site scripting (EUVD-2025-158257)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability classified as problematic has been found in Content Flipper Plugin up to 0.1 on WordPress. The impacted element is the function flipper_front of the component Shortcode Handler. This manipulation of the argument bgcolor causes cross site scripting. This vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2025-11769. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. No exploit exists.

items.title: CVE-2025-11260 | WP Headless CMS Framework Plugin up to 1.15 on WordPress Authorization Header protection mechanism (EUVD-2025-158258)
items.author: vuldb.com
items.content: A vulnerability described as critical has been identified in WP Headless CMS Framework Plugin up to 1.15 on WordPress. The affected element is an unknown function of the component Authorization Header Handler. The manipulation results in protection mechanism failure. This vulnerability is identified as CVE-2025-11260. The attack can be executed remotely. There is not any exploit available.

items.title: CVE-2025-12681 | Comment Edit Core Plugin up to 3.1.0 on WordPress Email Address ajax_get_comment information disclosure (EUVD-2025-158263)

items.content: A vulnerability categorized as problematic has been discovered in Comment Edit Core Plugin up to 3.1.0 on WordPress. items.content: A vulnerability was found in containerd up to 1.7.28/2.0.6/2.1.4. It has been rated as critical. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality in the library /var/lib/containerd. This manipulation causes incorrect execution-assigned permissions.
